entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food for an ever-growing population

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A challenging task to reduce alongside ensuring food security

entities.name: BRICS
entities.description: Emerging giant economies including Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of food produced globally, facing increased pressure due to changing food habits

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A finite resource necessary for food production

entities.name: LAND RESOURCES
entities.description: Finite land available for agricultural production

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where per capita water availability has decreased significantly

entities.name: PER CAPITA WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available per person, which has declined due to population growth

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WATER USE
entities.description: The current status and management of water used in farming

entities.name: TROPICAL RAIN-FED AREAS
entities.description: Regions where agriculture depends on rainfall and is the focus of water use analysis

entities.name: MANAGEMENT TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Land, water, nutrient, and crop management technologies used to manage agricultural water efficiently
